case_title: OWEN DAVID SPIZLER VS. RICHARD ASHMAN et al

docket_entries.description: REMOVED FROM PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR SEP-06-2011 AFTER CONFERENCE; MATTER DID NOT SETTLE
